title: Rocket Punch
description: Deal 13 damage. Draw 1 card. Whenever you create a Status, reduce this card's cost to 0 energy until played.
upgraded_description: Deal 14 damage. Draw 2 cards. Whenever you create a Status, reduce this card's cost to 0 energy until played.
notes: This card's energy cost is reduced to 0 until it is played whenever the player creates a Status card during the combat.
